🚨 URGENT: Verification Timeout

Dear HR Team,

IMMEDIATE ACTION REQUIRED: A critical verification process has timed out and requires your urgent intervention.

Verification Timeout Alert

The verification period for {{name}} has expired and requires immediate escalation and resolution.

Required Actions:

  • Review the verification status immediately
  • Contact the relevant parties for resolution
  • Escalate to management if necessary

Please address this matter immediately to prevent further delays in the onboarding process.

HR Department | Verification Management System
